##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Single bladed pale pink crystal, cell parameters are significantly different than those reported

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
